eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 06:00 PM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 12:00 AM MAR 12, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Austin, Texas. Suspect vehicle is a white 2022 Hyundai Venue with Texas license plate S W Y 9 5 9 9. Missing child is Alianna Bernardez OCampo, 2 year old Hispanic female last seen wearing a white t shirt. Suspect is Kermith Zapata Bernardez 25 year old Hispanic male. Call Austin Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1 AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Austin, Texas. Suspect vehicle is a white 2022 Hyundai Venue with Texas license plate S W Y 9 5 9 9. Missing child is Alianna Bernardez OCampo, 2 year old Hispanic female last seen wearing a white t shirt. Suspect is Kermith Zapata Bernardez 25 year old Hispanic male. Call Austin Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1. 
To view all active alerts, click here: https://txsubscribealerts.dps.texas.gov/alerts
